textByHashes.79a9e3939790fdfa71919b505abbb1ae85b2b8a0: I might be able to help. Fluffs followed me to my secret play area, I haven't seen her since.
textByHashes.df43da7ae07415865bdeae1c20f8fce37a2eca4b: Ohh...well, in that case I might be able to help. Fluffs followed me to my secret play area, I haven't seen her since.
textByHashes.de40bf5c9db607d84bf3113d21b76b8fe61c0c27: If I told you that, it wouldn't be a secret.
textByHashes.49e2f8639ffa029b400865b02fef655b0d8766f5: W..wh..what?! Y..you wouldn't! A young lad like me! I'd have you behind bars before nightfall!
textByHashes.3924a830a36d1d13a9733e66858a3d167c2e11d7: You shouldn't, but we won't help otherwise. We never liked that cat anyway, so what do you say?
textByHashes.7397f1634eeb6459b86bf2de673f7b3d911b33eb: Okay then, I'll find another way to make money.
textByHashes.55968a774353601c796bc2a550c16214bbfb93ba: I play at an abandoned lumber mill to the north east. Just beyond the Jolly Boar Inn. I saw Fluffs running around in there.
textByHashes.a61d6ddada5a42d358d8d3c34b19972838fc6f10: Well, you'll have to find the broken fence to get in. I'm sure you can manage that.
textByHashes.6740ee16304c86673710cd25892720b119842f36: I'm sure my mum will get over it.
textByHashes.8d1adc6d409113d0fe9d9d2a75e5a96b0e5f56c2: Weren't you listening? I saw the flea bag in the old lumber mill just north east of here. Just walk past the Jolly Boar Inn and you should find it.
textByHashes.9ccf911e6295cefb6fb7ff1537048a8351f8a198: You think you're tough do you?
textByHashes.0c61ee2cf577ee06885c91504659b9bcec41303c: I don't talk to strange old people.
textByHashes.2053d026241c499ddfca0e3fba51620512e4fb2f: We don't talk to strange old people.
textByHashes.261e5d517c7f3fbba567ffa097f9d2e61ff43efb: My brother reckons I can't solve this puzzle. I can't have him laughing at me! Do me a favour and solve it for me.
textByHashes.10ba7455f73a9c7bee6e75fb4b7bd4a4f48aeca5: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.
